info.title: Etholys API
info.description: Etholys API para chat IA e integrações empresariais. Inclui autenticação por API key e limites por plano.

post.description: Envia mensagem à IA, grava pergunta e resposta no PostgreSQL.

schema.title: Response List Conversations Ai Conversations Get
Response Get Messages Ai Conversations  Conversation Id  Messages Get
Response List Clients Api Product Clients Get
Response List Client Keys Api Product Clients  Client Id  Keys Get
Response Client Usage Alerts Api Product Clients  Client Id  Usage Alerts Get
Response Usage Alert Trend Api Product Usage Alerts Trend Get
Response Top Failing Usage Alert Clients Api Product Usage Alerts Top Failing Clients Get
Response My Request Logs Api Product Request Logs Get
Response Client Request Logs Api Product Clients  Client Id  Request Logs Get

get.description: Readiness check with dependency and critical config visibility.
Indica qual provedor de IA está configurado (sem gastar tokens).
